securityFindings.finding: JoinHousehold membership creation and code mark-used are not transactional. If marking used fails, the code could be reused. Low risk — worst case is a duplicate join attempt which is rejected by the already-member check.
securityFindings.recommendation: Consider wrapping in ent transaction in a future iteration
